Patch Set 9:

It isn't clear why you don't submit this for http://review.whamcloud.com/7200 with a separate Test-Parameters: line?  Having a separate patch just adds confusion about the current state of this work.

Also, it isn't clear whether the "full" test failures are a regression compared to regular test failures, since AFAIK the "full" tests never fully pass.

Patch Set 9:

Hi Andreas,

I'm sorry for the confusion. I intended to use this for-test-only patch to do experiments so as not to update http://review.whamcloud.com/7200 so many times and disturb reviewers. I added a comment in that gerrit ticket.

There are still some failures in the "full" test group results. I'm trying to figure out which are caused by the patch itself (and fix them) and which are known failures on master branch.
